name: Spinach Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Defrost the spinach and remove any excess moisture.
2. Chop the green onions.
3. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl.
4. Chill the mixture for several hours to allow flavors to meld.
5. Serve with raw vegetables or in a bread bowl made from a round loaf of bread, cut into cubes around the edges.
